description: This is the documentation for the ElevenLabs API. You can use this API to use our service programmatically, this is...

novel_features.name: Voice Discovery
novel_features.description: Search owned and shared ElevenLabs voices through one compact, JSON-first command.

novel_features.name: TTS Resolution
novel_features.description: Resolve a voice, model, output format, default settings, and subscription context before rendering.

novel_features.name: TTS Render Manifest
novel_features.description: Render text to an audio file and print a structured manifest with file path, byte count, model, and voice.

novel_features.name: Dialogue Cast
novel_features.description: Render speaker-labelled dialogue lines by resolving speaker-to-voice assignments and saving audio.

catalog_description: Create and manage ElevenLabs audio workflows: text-to-speech, voice conversion, transcription, dubbing, music, voices, and agents.
